---
applyTo: "docs/**"
---

# Instructions for docs/

When editing `docs/`:

- Keep command syntax aligned with wrapper-first policy from `AGENTS.md` and `scripts/README.md`.
- Validate references, relative links, and file paths against actual repository structure.
- Prefer canonical sources over duplicated procedural prose.
- If documentation behavior changes, update `docs/release_notes.md`.
- Keep UTF-8 encoding and avoid hidden/escaped Unicode regressions.
